description: Maps AICPA SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria to Microsoft 365 controls and audit queries

Security.description: Control who accesses systems; detect and respond to threats

controls.name: MFA Enforced for All Users
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication is required for all user accounts via Conditional Access or Security Defaults
controls.passCriteria: CA policy with MFA grant control targeting all users, or Security Defaults enabled
controls.remediation: Create a Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users, or enable Security Defaults in Entra admin center > Properties.
controls.compensatingControl: If Conditional Access is not licensed (requires Entra ID P1), enable Security Defaults which enforces MFA for all users at no additional cost.

controls.name: Sign-in Risk Policy Configured
controls.description: Conditional Access policy evaluates sign-in risk level to block or challenge risky authentications
controls.passCriteria: At least one CA policy with signInRiskLevels in conditions
controls.remediation: Create a Conditional Access policy with sign-in risk condition set to Medium and High, requiring MFA or blocking access.
controls.compensatingControl: If Entra ID P2 is not available for risk-based CA, enable Security Defaults (blocks legacy auth and requires MFA) and monitor sign-in logs manually for anomalous patterns.

controls.name: User Risk Policy Configured
controls.description: Conditional Access policy evaluates user risk level to enforce password change or block access for compromised accounts
controls.passCriteria: At least one CA policy with userRiskLevels in conditions
controls.remediation: Create a Conditional Access policy with user risk condition set to High, requiring password change.
controls.compensatingControl: If Entra ID P2 is not available, manually review the risky users report weekly and force password resets for flagged accounts.

controls.name: Admin Accounts Use Phishing-Resistant MFA
controls.description: Privileged accounts are registered for phishing-resistant authentication methods (FIDO2, Windows Hello, Certificate-based)
controls.passCriteria: Admin users registered for FIDO2 or Windows Hello for Business
controls.remediation: Register admin accounts for FIDO2 security keys or Windows Hello for Business. Create a CA policy requiring phishing-resistant MFA strength for admin roles.
controls.compensatingControl: If FIDO2 keys are not feasible (budget or logistics), ensure Microsoft Authenticator is configured with number matching and additional context enabled, which provides stronger-than-default MFA.

controls.name: Least Privilege Admin Roles
controls.description: Global Administrator role is limited to 2-4 accounts following the principle of least privilege
controls.passCriteria: Between 2 and 4 Global Administrator role members
controls.remediation: Review Global Admin assignments in Entra admin center > Roles and administrators. Reduce to 2-4 accounts; use scoped admin roles for day-to-day tasks.
controls.compensatingControl: If more than 4 Global Admins are operationally required, implement Privileged Identity Management (PIM) with time-limited just-in-time activation and require approval for activation.

controls.name: Unified Audit Log Enabled
controls.description: Microsoft 365 Unified Audit Log is enabled to capture activity events across all services
controls.remediation: Enable audit logging: Set-AdminAuditLogConfig -UnifiedAuditLogIngestionEnabled $true. Verify in Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Audit.

controls.name: Defender Alert Policies Active
controls.description: Microsoft Defender alert policies are configured and enabled to detect threats
controls.passCriteria: Alert policies exist and are in an active state
controls.remediation: Review alert policies in Microsoft Defender portal > Policies & rules > Alert policy. Ensure default threat detection policies are enabled.
controls.relatedCollector: Get-DefenderPolicyReport.ps1 — provides detailed Defender policy configuration evidence

controls.name: Alerts Are Triaged and Responded To
controls.description: Security alerts show evidence of review and response (not all in 'new' status)
controls.passCriteria: At least some alerts have been triaged (status is resolved or inProgress)
controls.remediation: Regularly review and triage security alerts in Microsoft Defender portal. Assign, investigate, and resolve alerts to demonstrate active incident response.

Confidentiality.description: Sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access

controls.name: SharePoint Sites Not Publicly Shared
controls.description: SharePoint sites do not have anonymous access links or public sharing enabled
controls.passCriteria: SharingCapability is not 'ExternalUserAndGuestSharing' with anonymous links
controls.remediation: In SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing, restrict external sharing to 'Existing guests' or more restrictive setting.

controls.name: External Sharing Restricted
controls.description: Tenant-level SharePoint external sharing is set to a restrictive level
controls.remediation: In SharePoint admin center > Policies > Sharing, set sharing level to 'New and existing guests' or more restrictive.

controls.name: Encryption in Transit Enforced
controls.description: TLS 1.2 or higher is enforced for all M365 service connections
controls.remediation: Microsoft 365 enforces TLS 1.2 by default. Verify no legacy applications use TLS 1.0/1.1.

controls.name: Guest Access Governance
controls.description: Guest invitations are restricted to administrators rather than allowing all users to invite
controls.passCriteria: allowInvitesFrom is set to 'adminsAndGuestInviters' or more restrictive
controls.remediation: In Entra admin center > External Identities > External collaboration settings, set 'Guest invite restrictions' to 'Only users assigned to specific admin roles can invite guest users'.

controls.name: DLP Policies Active and Enforcing
controls.description: At least one Data Loss Prevention policy is active in enforcement mode (not test-only)
controls.passCriteria: At least one DLP policy with Mode set to 'Enable' (not 'TestWithNotifications' or 'TestWithoutNotifications')
controls.remediation: In Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data loss prevention > Policies, create or enable a DLP policy in enforcement mode.
controls.compensatingControl: If Purview DLP is not licensed, implement Exchange mail flow rules to block sensitive data patterns (SSN, credit card) in outbound email as a partial compensating control.

controls.name: Sensitivity Labels Published
controls.description: Sensitivity labels are configured and published to users for data classification
controls.passCriteria: At least one sensitivity label exists and is enabled
controls.remediation: In Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Information protection > Labels, create and publish sensitivity labels to classify and protect sensitive data.
controls.compensatingControl: If sensitivity labels are not licensed, implement a documented manual classification scheme using folder structures and naming conventions with user training.

controls.name: Data Retention Policies Configured
controls.description: At least one retention policy is active to manage data lifecycle
controls.passCriteria: At least one retention policy is active and enabled
controls.remediation: In Microsoft Purview compliance portal > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies, create retention policies for key workloads.

Security.name: Failed Sign-in Attempts
Security.description: Authentication attempts that failed due to incorrect credentials or policy blocks
Security.note: Capped at 100 events; for full population, use Purview Audit (Premium) or continuous monitoring automation

Security.name: Risky Sign-in Detections
Security.description: Sign-in events flagged as risky by Identity Protection

Security.name: MFA Challenge Events
Security.description: Authentication events where MFA was successfully completed

Security.name: Alert Response Activity
Security.description: Security alerts that have been triaged, showing active incident response

Security.name: Privileged Role Changes
Security.description: Directory audit events for role assignment additions and removals

Confidentiality.name: Sharing Events Detected
Confidentiality.description: SharePoint and OneDrive sharing events showing data access patterns

Confidentiality.name: Unauthorized Sharing Blocked
Confidentiality.description: Sharing attempts that were blocked by policy

Confidentiality.name: DLP Policy Matches
Confidentiality.description: Data loss prevention rule matches showing policy enforcement activity

relatedCollectors.description: Existing M365-Assess collectors that produce SOC 2-relevant evidence

collectors.purpose: Secure Score trends demonstrate ongoing risk awareness and vulnerability management
Inventories OAuth app registrations and consent grants for third-party risk assessment
Documents Defender for Office 365 anti-malware, Safe Links, and Safe Attachments configuration
